message:
fix: duplicate React keys flooding console with warnings (#7644)

Two sources of duplicate keys:
1. Dashboard demo cards (demo-1 through demo-7) were duplicated when
   loadDashboard merged local-only cards with API cards that fell back
   to the same demo set. Fix: exclude cards already present in apiCards.
2. EventStream keys weren't unique when the same cluster emitted
   identical events (same object/timestamp/reason). Fix: append index.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
